canonical_definition: A human-authored Thai instruction-following dataset containing 6,916 test samples across four domains (Medical, Law, Finance, Retail) and seven task types, used for zero-shot evaluation and instruction tuning.
papers: Shallow Focus, Deep Fixes: Enhancing Shallow Layers Vision Attention Sinks to Alleviate Hallucination inLVLMs
